decisions.decision: profileStaleWarning and profileLoadError are mutually exclusive per fetch attempt
decisions.rationale: Stale path sets warning only; no-cache path sets error only — avoids double indicators

decisions.decision: profileTriggersStructureError bool introduced for not-an-array case
decisions.rationale: Separate from per-trigger schema warnings to give accurate panel message

decisions.decision: Playwright test 4 sends get-game directly via service worker
decisions.rationale: chrome.tabs.query({ active:true }) returns popup itself after popup opens — bypass needed
